title: How a Godly Man Talks About Other Men When They're Not in the Room
caption:
Anyone can be decent to your face. That costs nothing.

The real read on a man is what he says the second you leave the room. If it changes, the version you got was an act. Character is what survives your absence: what he does with what you told him in confidence, whether he laughs along or says something when the group turns on someone.

Matthew 18 gives the harder route on purpose. Go to him first, alone, before it becomes a topic for everyone else.

Same guy in the room and out of it. That's the whole test.

Who's the guy you'd trust to talk about you the same way whether you're there or not? Save this as a check on yourself, not just other men.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #brotherhood #christianity
